text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan has been hanging out with her new
friends every day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing their words of support feels awkward to
her, but also nice. She seems much more cheerful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have a joint training session with Trainer
Kiryuin, whose wordy explanations go over
Jordan's head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm able to explain things in a way that's easier for
her to digest, but she can't help but thinking...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"...If only I could understand all your strategies,
maybe I'd be a stronger runner."
